title: BWG Mini Christmas Saucer Crackers - Green and Gold - Set of 16
features: Compact Size: Designed as saucer crackers, perfect for adding festive charm to your table without taking up too much space.
Elegant Design: Features a mix of green and white crackers with delicate gold star patterns and golden bows for a touch of luxury.
Festive Fun: Each cracker contains a fun motto and surprise, making these mini crackers ideal for Christmas parties or place settings.
description: Compact Size: Designed as saucer crackers, perfect for adding festive charm to your table without taking up too much space. Elegant Design: Features a mix of green and white crackers with delicate gold star patterns and golden bows for a touch of luxury. Festive Fun: Each cracker contains a fun motto and surprise, making these mini crackers ideal for Christmas parties or place settings. Size: 4.5" (11 cm) Material: Paper Add a festive touch to your Christmas table with this set of 8 saucer crackers, featuring an elegant design in green, white, and gold. Perfect for smaller tables or as a decorative accent to your holiday settings, these mini crackers combine style and fun. Each cracker is beautifully wrapped with golden bows and contains a delightful surprise along with a classic Christmas motto. Whether you're hosting a large family gathering or an intimate dinner, these saucer crackers bring joy and sophistication to your holiday celebrations.
